# 🎓 College Event Registration Website

A web-based event registration system developed to manage college events and participant registrations.
This project allows students to browse events, register for them, and enables admins to view and export participant data.

---

## 🚀 Features

* 📌 View multiple college events with date & time
* 🔍 Search events instantly
* 🌙 Dark mode support
* 📝 Student registration form
* 👥 Participant list display
* 📊 Admin panel to view registrations
* 📁 Export participants to CSV
* 🔳 Auto-generated QR code after registration
* 🎯 Registration limit control per event

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

* HTML5
* CSS3
* JavaScript (Vanilla JS)
* LocalStorage (for data handling)
* QRCode.js library

---

## 📂 Project Structure

```
Event-Registration/
│── index.html          # Event listing page
│── register.html       # Registration form
│── admin.html          # Admin panel
│── styles.css          # Main styles
│── style.css           # Registration styles
│── script1.js          # Application logic
│── img2/               # Images folder
```

---

## ▶️ How to Run

1. Download or clone the repository
2. Open `index.html` in any browser
3. Select an event and register
4. Open `admin.html` to view participant data

---

## 📌 Note

This project uses browser LocalStorage instead of a backend database.
It demonstrates frontend logic, event handling, and user interaction design.

Future improvements may include:

* Backend integration (Spring Boot / Node.js)
* Database storage (MySQL)
* Authentication system
* Online deployment
